Name: Spark
Note: Higashi-Umeda Stn (3 min). Hidden listening bar, vinyl jazz; ¥1000 entry.

Name: Shinsekai
Note: Dobutsuen-mae Stn (1 min). Retro 1900s neighborhood + Tsutenkaku tower; kushikatsu street.

Name: Tennoji Park
Note: Tennoji Stn (3 min). Free park + paid Keitakuen garden ¥150.

Name: Magic Cafe & Bar Shinsekai
Note: Dobutsuen-mae Stn (3 min). Close-up magic w/ ¥1500 cover; English-friendly.

Name: Namba City
Note: Namba Stn (1 min). 5-floor mall above Namba Stn; B2 depachika is excellent.

Name: Osaka Castle
Note: Tanimachi-yonchome Stn (10 min). Castle museum ¥600 — outer park free; sakura March-April.

Name: American Village
Note: Shinsaibashi Stn (5 min). Streetwear thrift mecca — Big Step mall is the anchor.

Name: Tonbori River Walk
Note: Namba Stn (3 min). Glico sign at night > day; takoyaki at Wanaka.
